name: Twilio
description: Coordinate SMS, WhatsApp, voice, Verify, and webhook workflows through Twilio with explicit approvals, contact allowlists, and spend guardrails.

access.label: Twilio account and reviewed connector
access.detail: Requires Twilio API credentials, an approved sender or service, webhook handling where needed, and human-reviewed agent rules outside BuildingHub.

tools.name: twilio.messages.create
tools.detail: Send SMS, MMS, WhatsApp, RCS, or channel messages after recipient, sender, content, approval, and spend checks pass.

tools.name: twilio.calls.create
tools.detail: Start outbound voice calls only through an approved workflow with caller ID, TwiML URL, contact, and cost guardrails.

tools.name: twilio.verify.verifications.create
tools.detail: Start verification challenges through a configured Verify Service.

tools.name: twilio.messaging.webhook
tools.detail: Receive inbound message and status callback events through a connector or hosted callback service.

tools.name: twilio
tools.detail: Optional Twilio CLI for profile inspection and manual setup tasks.

tools.name: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID
tools.detail: Twilio Account SID for the account or subaccount used by the connector.

endpoints.name: twilio-rest-api
endpoints.detail: Base Twilio REST API surface for account, messaging, voice, phone number, and related resources.

endpoints.name: twilio-messages-api
endpoints.detail: Messages resource for outbound SMS, MMS, WhatsApp, RCS, and messaging-channel sends.

endpoints.name: twilio-calls-api
endpoints.detail: Calls resource for outbound voice calls and status tracking.

endpoints.name: twilio-verify-api
endpoints.detail: Verify API surface for starting verification challenges through a configured service.

endpoints.name: twilio-inbound-message-webhook
endpoints.detail: HTTPS callback endpoint configured in Twilio for inbound messages, replies, and status callbacks.

capabilities.name: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID
capabilities.detail: Twilio Account SID for the account or subaccount used by the connector.

capabilities.name: TWILIO_API_KEY
capabilities.detail: Preferred API Key SID for Twilio REST API access.

capabilities.name: TWILIO_API_SECRET
capabilities.detail: Preferred API Key secret for Twilio REST API access. Never print it.

capabilities.name: TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN
capabilities.detail: Fallback account Auth Token only when API keys are not available. Keep this out of logs and durable notes.

capabilities.name: TWILIO_MESSAGING_SERVICE_SID
capabilities.detail: Optional Messaging Service SID for outbound messaging workflows.

capabilities.name: TWILIO_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID
capabilities.detail: Optional Verify Service SID for verification workflows.

capabilities.name: TWILIO_ALLOWED_RECIPIENTS
capabilities.detail: Contact allowlist enforced by the connector or agent runtime before outbound messages or calls.

capabilities.name: TWILIO_SPEND_LIMIT
capabilities.detail: Human-defined spend or rate limit enforced outside BuildingHub.

capabilities.name: twilio
capabilities.detail: Optional Twilio CLI for profile inspection and setup checks.

variables.label: Account SID
variables.value: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID in agent environment or connector profile

variables.label: API key SID
variables.value: TWILIO_API_KEY in agent environment or connector profile

variables.label: API key secret
variables.value: TWILIO_API_SECRET in agent environment or connector profile

variables.label: Fallback auth token
variables.value: TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN only when API keys are unavailable

variables.label: Sender or service
variables.value: Twilio phone number, Messaging Service SID, WhatsApp sender, or Verify Service SID

variables.label: Webhook URL
variables.value: HTTPS endpoint for inbound messages and status callbacks

variables.label: Approval policy
variables.value: Which outbound messages, calls, and verification attempts require human approval

steps.title: Create least-privilege access
steps.detail: Create a Twilio API key or connector credential for the specific account, subaccount, and capabilities agents may use.

steps.title: Configure senders and services
steps.detail: Set up the phone number, Messaging Service, WhatsApp sender, voice caller ID, or Verify Service needed by the workflow.

steps.title: Wire inbound events
steps.detail: Point Twilio webhooks at the reviewed callback service when the workflow needs inbound replies or delivery status.

steps.title: Set guardrails
steps.detail: Document allowed contacts, allowed channels, message/call approval rules, rate limits, and spend limits before agent access.

steps.title: Install the building
steps.detail: Add Twilio to Agent Town after credentials, senders, webhook handling, and guardrails have been reviewed.

agentGuide.summary: Use Twilio when an agent needs to coordinate SMS, WhatsApp, voice, Verify, or webhook communication through a reviewed Twilio connector with explicit human guardrails.
useCases: Check whether Twilio credentials, senders, services, or webhooks are ready for a communication workflow.
Prepare outbound SMS, WhatsApp, voice, or Verify actions for human approval.
Inspect inbound message or status callback setup without exposing phone numbers, transcripts, or secrets.
setup: Read the BuildingHub manifest and official Twilio docs before using any Twilio capability.
Prefer API keys over the primary Auth Token for automated access.
Confirm allowed recipients, allowed channels, rate limits, spend limits, and approval rules before sending messages or placing calls.
Do not print Twilio secrets, phone numbers, message bodies, call recordings, or transcripts into durable logs or Library notes.
Ask for human approval before any outbound communication unless a narrower workflow has already been approved.

commands.label: Check Twilio CLI
commands.detail: Confirms the optional Twilio CLI is installed.

env.name: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID
env.detail: Twilio Account SID for the account or subaccount used by the connector.

env.name: TWILIO_API_KEY
env.detail: Preferred API Key SID for Twilio REST API access.

env.name: TWILIO_API_SECRET
env.detail: Preferred API Key secret. Never print it.

env.name: TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN
env.detail: Fallback account Auth Token only when API keys are unavailable. Never print it.

env.name: TWILIO_MESSAGING_SERVICE_SID
env.detail: Optional Messaging Service SID for outbound messaging.

env.name: TWILIO_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID
env.detail: Optional Verify Service SID for verification workflows.

env.name: TWILIO_ALLOWED_RECIPIENTS
env.detail: Required contact allowlist enforced by the connector or agent runtime.

env.name: TWILIO_SPEND_LIMIT
env.detail: Required spend or rate guardrail enforced outside BuildingHub.
